All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AbstractReportGenerator
Base class for Jasper report generators.
AbstractReportGenerator
Compatibility alias for legacy references in the service package.
AbstractReportGeneratorTest
Tests for AbstractReportGenerator focusing on the behaviour added to support AbstractReportGenerator.setReportData(List).
Account
Represents an account with entries and a many-to-many relationship with Funds.
AccountDetails
The Interface AccountDetails.
AccountDetailsImpl
Represents an immutable account description.
AccountingEntry
Represents an Accounting Entry.
AccountingTransaction
The Class AccountingTransaction.
AccountingTransactionBuilder
The Class AccountingTransactionBuilder.
AccountNumberMap
Utility to create a lookup map from account number to Account details.
AccountRepository
Repository that manages Account rows and their associated fund mappings inside the database.
AccountsActivityPanelFX
A JavaFX panel that displays account activity (transactions) from a given Ledger.
AccountsActivityPanelFX.TransactionRow
This class uses JavaFX properties (SimpleStringProperty, SimpleObjectProperty) to enable data binding with the TableView columns.
AccountsActivityPanelFXTest
 
AccountService
Service class providing static methods for managing Account objects.
AccountService.AccountBalance
Represents the balance of a specific account, including its ID, name, and balance amount.
AccountServiceTest
 
AccountSide
Account Side: debit or credit
AccountsPanelFX
JavaFX port of AccountsPanel.
AccountsPanelFX.AccountRow
The Class AccountRow.
AccountsPanelFXTest
 
AccountTransactionDetailsPanelFX
A JavaFX BorderPane that displays transaction details for a selected account within a specified date range.
AccountTransactionDetailsPanelFX.TransactionDisplayRow
Represents a single row of data to be displayed in the transaction details table.
AccountTransactionDetailsPanelFXListenerTest
Unit tests for AccountTransactionDetailsPanelFX listener management.
AccountTransactionDetailsPanelFXTest
 
AccountType
Account type enumeration.
ActionCancelledException
Exception thrown when an action is cancelled by the user, for example, by closing a file dialog without selecting a file.
AlertBox
Utility class providing static methods to display common JavaFX Alert dialogs.
ApplicationContext
The Interface ApplicationContext.
ApplicationContextImpl
The Class ApplicationContextImpl.

Skeleton generator for JRXML template ASSET_DTL_5a.jrxml

Skeleton generator for JRXML template ASSET_DTL_5c.jrxml

AssetDtl5aReportBean
 
AssetDtl5aUndepositedFundsLineItem
 
Balance
Represents the balance of an account at a specific point in time, as typically found in OFX financial data.
BALANCE_3Bean
Generated bean for sheet BALANCE_3
BALANCE_3JasperGenerator
Skeleton generator for JRXML template BALANCE_3.jrxml
BalanceSheetPanelFX
Displays the balance sheet as a JavaFX table with print/export actions.
BalanceSheetPanelFX.BalanceRow
Holds a row for the balance sheet table.
BankAccountInfo
Represents bank account information, commonly found in OFX data.
BankMsgs
Represents the banking messages section within an OFX response, specifically containing a statement transaction response.
BankTransactionList
Represents a list of bank account transactions for a specified period, as typically found in OFX financial data.
BeanShell
A simple container for managing a static map of beans (objects) accessible by name.
Budget
Stub Budget class for the standalone demo project.
BudgetLine
Represents a single line item within a budget.
BudgetLineDialogFX
The Class BudgetLineDialogFX.
BundledTemplateJasperGenerator
Generator used when only bundle metadata is available on the classpath.
CellItem
Represents a single cell from an Excel sheet in the logical model.
CellUtil
Helpers for extracting typed values from POI cells, with sane fallbacks, without throwing.
ChartOfAccounts
Mutable container that holds every Account in the company and supports parent/child relationships.
ChartOfAccountsBuilder
The Class ChartOfAccountsBuilder.
ChartOfAccountsIOService
Utility for persisting a ChartOfAccounts to / from either a human-readable JSON document or an Excel spreadsheet (.xlsx).
ChartOfAccountsService
Thin faÃ§ade over ChartOfAccounts that provides CRUD helpers used by the UI layer as well as import/export utilities.
ChartOfAccountsTablePanelFX
Displays the chart of accounts as a JavaFX table with print/export actions.
ChartOfAccountsTablePanelFX.AccountRow
Row wrapper for the table.
ChartOfAccountsTest
 
ChartTranslationMap
Holds the mapping from dropdown labels in the ledger to canonical chart-of-accounts strings.
CloseCompanyFileAction
Action class responsible for handling the closing of the current company file.
CoaEditorPanelFX
Interactive ladder view for editing a company's Chart of Accounts.
CoaEditorPanelFXTest
 
COMMENTSBean
Generated bean for sheet COMMENTS
COMMENTSJasperGenerator
Skeleton generator for JRXML template COMMENTS.jrxml
Company
Represents a company, encapsulating all its core data components such as profile information, ledger, chart of accounts, and the associated data file.
CompanyCreatedCallback
The Interface CompanyCreatedCallback.
CompanyDataRepository
Persists and loads the core Company aggregates using normalized tables instead of the legacy blob store.
CompanyDataRepositoryTest
 
CompanyPersistenceTest
 
CompanyProfileModel
Represents the profile information for a company.
CompanyProfileRepository
Repository for reading and writing the single company profile row.
CompanyRepository
Repository responsible for persisting and retrieving Company aggregates from the shared H2 database.
CompanyRepository.CompanyRecord
Simple projection representing a stored company row.
CompanySelectionPanelFX
Lists the companies stored inside the shared database and allows the user to preview and open them.
CompanySelectionPanelFX.OnCompanyOpenedHandler
Callback invoked when a company has been successfully opened.
CompanySummary
Provides static methods to retrieve summary financial data for the currently loaded company.
CompanyTest

CONTACT_INFO_1JasperGenerator
Skeleton generator for JRXML template CONTACT_INFO_1.jrxml
ContentsBean
Generated bean for sheet Contents
ContentsJasperGenerator
Skeleton generator for JRXML template Contents.jrxml
CreateOrEditCompanyActionFX
Action class responsible for initiating the process to create a new company profile or edit an existing one.
CreateOrEditCompanyPanelFX
JavaFX wizard for creating or editing a company profile.
CreateOrEditCompanyPanelFXTest
 
CurrentCompany
Manages the currently active Company instance in the application.
CurrentCompany.CompanyChangeListener
Listener interface for receiving notifications about company state changes (e.g., opened or closed).
CurrentCompany.CompanyListener
Manages a list of CurrentCompany.CompanyChangeListeners and fires events to them.
Customer
Represents a customer in the nonprofit bookkeeping system.
CustomerService
Service class for managing customer and project-related data.
CustomerServiceTest
 
DashboardPanelFX
A JavaFX BorderPane that serves as the main dashboard for displaying journal transactions.
DashboardPanelFXTest
 
Database
The Class Database.
DataFiller
Reflection-based helper that populates a bean from a Map of fieldName -> value.
DataFillerTest
 
DataStorer
Abstraction for JSON-backed persistence of domain objects.
DatePanelFX
Lightweight JavaFX replacement for the old Swing JDatePanelImpl that was based on JDatePicker.org.
DateRangePickerDialog
Simple helper to prompt the user for a start and end date using two DatePicker controls inside a Dialog.
DateSelectionMode
Defines different modes for selecting dates or date ranges, typically used in report criteria dialogs.
DeferredRevenueLine
The Class DeferredRevenueLine.
DemoCompanySeeder
Populates a Company aggregate with a small but realistic chart of accounts and a handful of ledger transactions so that freshly created databases have something to explore.

DocumentRepository
Simple repository used to persist arbitrary JSON payloads inside the H2 database.
DocumentsPanelFX
JavaFX port of the Swing DocumentsPanel.
DocumentStorageService
DocumentStorageService manages attachment and retrieval of document files associated with transactions.
DonationsPanelFX
JavaFX replacement for the Swing DonationsPanel.
DonationsPanelFX.Donation
Represents a single donation record.
Donor
Donor represents a donor with an ID, name, total donation amount, and last donation date.
DonorContact
Simple contact information for a donor.
DonorRepository
Repository responsible for CRUD operations on the donor table.
DonorService
Service class for managing DonorContact information.
DonorsPanelFX
JavaFX port of DonorsPanel.
EntryRef
The Class EntryRef.
ExcelDataWriter
Utility class for writing data from a DefaultTableModel back to an existing Excel (XLSM) file, effectively creating a modified copy.
ExcelFormulaApplier
Placeholder class intended for applying spreadsheet-style formulas to manually evaluated values within an ExcelWorkbookPage.
ExcelLedgerImportService
Utility service for importing a specialized Excel ledger format.
ExcelLedgerRow
Represents a single row from an imported Excel ledger.
ExcelLedgerRow.Allocation
Represents one amount allocation within a row.
ExcelSheetSelectionDialog
Utility for selecting ledger sheets from an Excel workbook.
ExcelTableReader
Utility class for reading data from an Excel sheet into a Swing DefaultTableModel.
ExcelTemplateReportActionFX
Action for generating a single-sheet Excel template report.
ExcelTemplateWriter
Writes report values into a pre-existing XLSX template using field map metadata.
ExcelToJrxml
The Class ExcelToJrxml.
ExcelWorkbookPage
Represents a page (sheet) of an Excel workbook.
ExcelWorkbookPageReportService
Writes a single workbook page using a field translation map and report data.

Handles exporting the current company's Chart of Accounts to an XLSX file.
ExportFileActionFX
JavaFX action that exports account activity to OFX/QFX files.

FieldInfo
Describes a dynamic data field discovered in an Excel sheet.
FieldMap
In-memory representation of a single sheet's field mapping CSV.
FieldMapEntry
One row from a *_fieldmap.csv file.
FieldMapLoader
Loader for the *_fieldmap.csv files emitted by the ExcelÃ¢â€ â€™JRXML/bean generator.
FieldMapSqlBuilder
Builds SQL select lists from report fieldmap resources.
FileExportService
Handles exporting ledger data to OFX/QFX statement files.
FileExportService.ExportResult
Result object describing the outcome of an export attempt.
FileExportService.StatementFormat
Supported statement formats.

FileImportService
Service class for importing financial transactions from various file formats like OFX and QIF.

FileUtils
Utility class for file-related operations.

Represents information about a financial institution as found in OFX data.

JavaFX translation of the Swing FundsPanel.

GeneralJournalEntryPanelFX
Backwards-compatible entry point that preserves the legacy GeneralJournalEntryPanelFX type while delegating to the modern JournalEntryWorkspaceFX implementation.

GenerateAccountActivityReportAction
Generates a transaction detail report showing account activity.
GenerateBalanceSheetAction
Generates a balance sheet report.
GenerateCashFlowStatementAction
Generates a cash flow statement.
GenerateIncomeStatementAction
Generates an income statement using the ReportService.

GenerateReportsAction
JavaFX action handler for generating various types of reports.
GenerateReportsActionTest
Tests for GenerateReportsAction that focus on the legacy Swing bridge.
GenerateTrialBalanceAction
Generates a trial balance report.
Grant
Represents a grant received by the nonprofit organization.
GrantsPanelFX

GrantsPanelFX.GrantRow
A simple data class (POJO) used to represent a row in the grants TableView.
GrantsService
Service class for managing Grant objects.

H2ScriptCompanyImporter
Imports company data that has been exported as a standard H2 SQL script.
HelpAction
Handles the action of displaying help content in a JavaFX application.

HelpContent
Utility methods for loading help documentation resources.
HelpPanelFX
JavaFX version of HelpPanel.
ImportCoaXlsxActionFX
Handles the action of importing a Chart of Accounts from an XLSX file.
ImportedTransaction
Represents a transaction imported from an external source, such as an OFX file.
ImporterCli
Example CLI entry point.
ImportFileActionFX
Handles the action of importing a financial statement file in a JavaFX application.

ImportFromOutlandsLedgerActionFX
JavaFX action that imports an SCA ledger stored in an Excel workbook (typically .xlsx) and displays the parsed rows inside the shared PageViewerPanel.
ImportSCALedgerActionFX
JavaFX action that runs the full ledger import pipeline and persists transactions into the application's journal tables.

Represents an inventory item, typically a fixed asset, subject to depreciation.

Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
JacksonDataStorerMultipleEntriesTest
The Class JacksonDataStorerMultipleEntriesTest.
JacksonDataStorerZipTest
The Class JacksonDataStorerZipTest.
JacksonReportLoader
Report loader that inspects serialized JasperReports XML and dispatches to the Jackson-based loader when the root element matches a report or template type.

JavaFXTestBase
 
JdbcBeanLoader
Executes a JDBC query and maps each row to a bean using DataFiller.
JdbcBeanLoader.SqlParameterSetter
The Interface SqlParameterSetter.
Journal
The Class Journal.
JournalEntry
Represents a single entry within a journal, detailing a transaction's impact on a specific account.
JournalEntryTest
 
JournalEntryWorkspaceFocusCommitTest
 
JournalEntryWorkspaceFX
Shared workspace UI for creating or editing general journal entries.
JournalEntryWorkspaceFX.Line
Public row model so existing tests can reason about the table state.
JournalEntryWorkspaceFXTest
 
JournalLedgerPersistenceGateway
JDBC-backed implementation that stores transactions using JournalRepository.
JournalPanelFX
JavaFX panel for displaying and managing journal transactions.
JournalPanelFXTest
 
JournalQueryCriteria
Immutable criteria object describing how journal transactions should be filtered before mapping them into report beans.
JournalQueryCriteria.AccountMatchMode
Determines how account number filters are interpreted.
JournalQueryCriteria.Builder
Mutable builder for JournalQueryCriteria.
JournalRepository
JournalRepository ----------------- This repository is responsible for persisting and loading the application's journal: a set of accounting transactions (headers) plus their line items (entries) and optional key/value metadata (transaction_info).
JRXmlLoader
Utility class that helps parsing a JRXML file into a JasperDesign object.
JrxmlValidator
JRXML validator (v5.1): 1) XML well-formedness (DOM parse; no network) 2) Optional: namespace & section-shape normalization BEFORE schema 3) Optional: XSD validation against monolithic schema 4) Optional: aggressive rewrites to fit schema (bands, root normalization) 5) Jasper digestion via JRXmlLoader.load(...) to surface JRException causes 6) Lints (duplicate names, illegal identifiers, empty bands, class_/CDATA pitfalls) 7) Expression reference analysis: undeclared $F/$P/$V and unused declarations Usage: java tools.jrxml.JrxmlValidator --file path/to/report.jrxml [--fail-on-warn] java tools.jrxml.JrxmlValidator --dir path/to/reports [--fail-on-warn] Extra: --xsd /path/jrxml_monolithic_v5_1.xsd --normalize-namespace --normalize-banded (wrap direct printables in sections into with height) --normalize-bandless (lift children up into bandless sections) --fix-aggressive --write [--out dir] Exit codes: 0 = OK, 2 = any failures (or warnings if --fail-on-warn)
JrxmlValidatorSimple
The Class JrxmlValidatorSimple.
JrxmlXsdValidator
JRXML -> XSD validator (portable Java, no external deps) Features: - Validate a single .jrxml (--file) or recursively a directory (--dir) against an XSD (--xsd) - Optional conservative normalize pass (--normalize): drop DOCTYPE, add missing - Optional write normalized XML (--write) and/or to a separate output dir (--out) - CSV logging (--csv) with per-issue rows and embedded context lines - Prints per-file issues with (line, col) and surrounding context Build: javac JrxmlXsdValidator.java Examples: java JrxmlXsdValidator --xsd jrxml_monolithic_v6_0_corpus_strict.xsd --dir ./jrxml java JrxmlXsdValidator --xsd schema.xsd --file report.jrxml --context 5 --csv results.csv java JrxmlXsdValidator --xsd schema.xsd --dir ./jrxml --normalize --write --out ./fixed Exit code: 0 when all files are valid; 2 if any file is invalid or on setup errors.
JsonStorageRepository
Simple repository that persists arbitrary JSON payloads inside the shared H2 database.
Ledger
Represents a ledger, which primarily consists of a Journal containing all accounting transactions.
LedgerContainer
A container class designed to hold LedgerEntry objects, organized by fiscal quarters.
LedgerEntry
Represents a single entry in a ledger, potentially supporting splits across multiple accounts or funds.
LedgerImportService
Coordinates loading ledger spreadsheets and persisting the mapped transactions through the supplied persistence gateway.
LedgerImportServiceTest
 
LedgerMetadata
Represents metadata associated with a ledger or a set of ledger entries.
LedgerPersistenceGateway
Boundary interface that isolates the ledger importer from the persistence mechanism used by the main application.
LedgerQuarter
Represents all ledger rows from one quarter sheet (for example "Ledger_Q4").
LedgerQueryCriteria
Criteria for filtering accounting transactions.
LedgerQueryCriteria.Builder
The Class Builder.
LedgerQueryFacade
Filters transactions based on LedgerQueryCriteria.
LedgerQueryFacadeTest
 
LedgerReconcilePanelFX
LedgerReconcilePanelFX â€“ lets the user: â€¢ pick an account â€¢ import bank transactions from an OFX file (via ofx4j 1.38) â€¢ add bank transactions manually â€¢ toggle "cleared" on any row â€¢ export uncleared items to CSV
LedgerReportContext
Represents the context for generating a ledger report, typically for use with a templating engine like JXLS.
LedgerRow
One transaction row from Ledger_Q1 / Ledger_Q2 / Ledger_Q3 / Ledger_Q4.
LedgerSheetImporter
Reads one ledger sheet (e.g.
LedgerSplit
One accounting leg ("split") from a single ledger row.
LedgerToDomainMapper
Converts parsed LedgerRow objects into AccountingTransaction aggregates that the rest of the application can persist.
LedgerToDomainMapperTest
 
LegacyNpbkImportService
Service that imports legacy .npbk archives into the active H2 database.
LegacyNpbkImportServiceTest

LoadXlsmTableActionFX
JavaFX action handler for loading data from an Excel XLSM file.
MainApplicationView
Represents the main application view, structured as a BorderPane.
MainApplicationView.PanelType
Enum defining the different types of panels/tabs that can be displayed in the main application view.
NEWSLETTER_15Bean
Generated bean for sheet NEWSLETTER_15
NEWSLETTER_15JasperGenerator
Skeleton generator for JRXML template NEWSLETTER_15.jrxml
NoFileCreatedException
Exception thrown when an operation that is expected to create a file fails to do so.
NoFileException
Thrown when no file is available.
NonCompanyFile
Manages a statically accessible file reference, intended for files that are not directly part of a "Company" data structure.
NonprofitBookkeepingFX
Main JavaFX application class for Nonprofit Bookkeeping.
NpbkFileChooserFX
Unified Java FX file-chooser helper.
NpbkToH2ScriptMigrator
One-time utility that converts legacy .npbk archives into an H2 database script.
OFX
Represents the root element of an OFX (Open Financial Exchange) document.
Ofx20Writer
Ofx20Writer generates an OFX 2.0 compliant XML file for a list of banking transactions.
OfxTags
Known OFX tags
OfxV2JaxbWriter
Generates OFX 2.0 XML using JAXB-based model classes.
OfxV2Writer
Provides utility methods to write OFX (Open Financial Exchange) version 2.0 compliant XML files.
OfxV2Writer.BankAccountInfo
Inner class to hold data for bank account information used in OFX sections.
OfxV2Writer.CreditCardInfo
Inner class to hold data for credit card account information used in OFX sections.
OfxV2Writer.InvestmentData
Inner class to hold data for investment account information used in OFX sections.
OfxV2Writer.InvestmentPosition
Describes a single investment holding, such as a stock or mutual fund position.
OfxV2Writer.InvestmentTransactionData
Describes a single investment transaction entry within the statement.
OfxV2Writer.SecurityData
Identifies a security referenced by investment transactions and positions.
OfxV2Writer.SignonData
Inner class to hold data for the OFX sign-on section.
OfxV2Writer.TransactionData
Inner class to hold data for a single transaction, used by the OFX writer methods.
OfxV2WriterTest
 
OpenCompanyFileActionFX
Presents a dialog that lists companies stored inside the application database and allows the user to open one.
OtherAssetsLine
The Class OtherAssetsLine.
OtherLiabilitiesLine
The Class OtherLiabilitiesLine.
OutputFileActionFX
JavaFX counterpart to the Swing OutputFileAction.
PageViewer
Utility class for constructing tabular data used by PageViewerPanel.
PageViewerFX
Minimal JavaFX replacement for the Swing PageViewer.
PageViewerPanel
A Swing JPanel designed to display tabular data using a JTable.
PageViewerTest
The Class PageViewerTest.
PayablesLine
The Class PayablesLine.
Periodicity
Defines the frequency or period for which budget amounts are specified or broken down.
Person
Basic person record used for supplemental schedule counterparty selection.
PersonRef
The Class PersonRef.
PersonRepository
Repository for CRUD operations on the person table.
PersonService
Service wrapper for basic person CRUD used by supplemental schedule pickers.
Plugin
Defines the contract for plugins in the nonprofit bookkeeping application.
PreferencesManager
Manages application-specific preferences using the Java Preferences API.
PreferencesService
Manages application preferences, such as default directories and last used files.
PrepaidExpenseLine
The Class PrepaidExpenseLine.

ReportBundles
Loads Jasper report bundle metadata and exposes lookup helpers for generators and UI registries.
ReportBundles.Bundle
Immutable metadata describing a single generator/template bundle.
ReportConfiguration
Represents the configuration for generating a specific report.
ReportConfigurationService
Persists ReportConfiguration definitions in the H2 database.
ReportConfigurationServiceTest
 
ReportConfigurationTableModel
A Swing AbstractTableModel for displaying a list of ReportConfiguration objects.
ReportContext
Holds the context or criteria for generating a specific financial report.
ReportContext
Compatibility alias for reports runtime context used by service tests.
ReportContextAware
Optional hook for report generators that need access to the ReportContext after instantiation.
ReportContextHolder
Thread-local holder for ReportContext during report data generation.
ReportCriteria
Encapsulates the criteria used for generating a report.
ReportCriteriaDialog
Utility class for displaying a JavaFX dialog to gather criteria for generating reports.
ReportDataBundle
Wrapper that collapses multiple data rows into a single Jasper bean.
ReportDataBundleTest
 
ReportDataFetcher
Utility for loading report beans via JDBC.
ReportGenerator
Utility class for generating Excel-based reports using JXLS templates and Apache POI.
ReportGeneratorLoader
Utility that instantiates and interacts with Jasper report generator classes using reflection.
ReportMetadata
Holds metadata associated with a generated report.
ReportMetadataTest
 
ReportPeriodPreset
Preset periods that can be applied to reporting and analytical views.
ReportPeriodPreset.DateRange
Simple value object describing a closed date range.
ReportService
Service class responsible for preparing data contexts for various financial reports and orchestrating the generation of reports using templating engines like JasperReports.
ReportService.ReportType
Enum-safe keys for the Jasper report generator registry.
ReportsPanelFX
JavaFX rewrite of ReportsPanel.
ReportsPanelFX.ReportRow
It wraps ReportMetadata for easy display with PropertyValueFactory.
ReportsPanelFXTest
 
ReportTemplates
Registry of available Jasper report templates.
ReportTemplates.TemplateInfo
Immutable holder for template metadata.
ReportWriterIntf
Defines the contract for report writers.
SaleRecord
Represents a single sale transaction for the Sales & COG panel.
SalesAndCOGPanelFX
JavaFX port of SalesAndCOGPanel.
SalesAndCOGPanelFX.SaleRow
Represents a single sale transaction row in the table.
SalesService
Service class for managing SaleRecord objects.
SalesServiceTest
 
SamplePlugin
A sample plugin implementation to demonstrate and test the plugin framework.
SaveCompanyFileAction
Action class responsible for saving the current company's data to persistent storage.
SaveModifiedCopyActionFX
JavaFX equivalent of the Swing SaveModifiedCopyAction.
SCALedgerDataLoader
Utility class for loading data from SCA formatted Excel spreadsheets into Java objects using JXLS Reader.
SCALedgerPlugin
Plugin for handling SCA Ledger functionalities.
SECONDARY_ACCOUNTS_2bBean
Generated bean for sheet SECONDARY_ACCOUNTS_2b
SECONDARY_ACCOUNTS_2bJasperGenerator
Skeleton generator for JRXML template SECONDARY_ACCOUNTS_2b.jrxml
SECONDARY_ACCOUNTS_2cBean
Generated bean for sheet SECONDARY_ACCOUNTS_2c
SECONDARY_ACCOUNTS_2cJasperGenerator
Skeleton generator for JRXML template SECONDARY_ACCOUNTS_2c.jrxml
SECONDARY_ACCOUNTS_2dBean
Generated bean for sheet SECONDARY_ACCOUNTS_2d
SECONDARY_ACCOUNTS_2dJasperGenerator
Skeleton generator for JRXML template SECONDARY_ACCOUNTS_2d.jrxml
SecurityNode
Represents a security, typically identified by an ISIN (International Securities Identification Number) and a ticker symbol.
SecurityNodeTest
 
SettingsModel
Represents the application settings model.
SettingsModel.User
Represents a user account within the settings model.
SettingsPanelFX
JavaFX port of the original Swing SettingsPanel.
SettingsPanelFXTest
 
SettingsService
Service for loading and saving application settings.
SheetModel
Logical representation of a single Excel sheet, including layout items and the discovered dynamic fields.
SignonMsgs
Represents the Sign-On Messages (SIGNONMSGSRSV1) aggregate in an OFX response.
SignonResponse
Represents the Sign-On Response (SONRS) aggregate in an OFX file.
SimpleUITest
The Class SimpleUITest.
SkeletonCoaPanel
A JavaFX panel that displays a company's Chart of Accounts (COA) in a TreeTableView.
SkeletonDashboardPanel
A JavaFX panel that serves as a dashboard, displaying key financial figures (Total Assets, Total Liabilities, Equity, YTD Income) and a list of recent transactions.
SkeletonJournalPanel
A JavaFX panel that displays journal entries from the current company's ledger.
SkeletonJournalPanel.JournalDisplayEntry
Represents a single displayable row in the journal table.
SkeletonPanelResetTest
The Class SkeletonPanelResetTest.
SkeletonReportsPanel
A JavaFX panel for generating new reports and viewing a list of previously generated reports.
SqlQueryPanelFX
The Class SqlQueryPanelFX.
StatementResponse
Represents the Statement Response (STMTRS) aggregate in an OFX banking message.
StatementTransactionResponse
Represents the Statement Transaction Response (STMTTRNRS) aggregate in an OFX file.
Status
Represents the status of an OFX request or response.
Summary
The Class Summary.
SummaryAccount
The Class SummaryAccount.
SummaryFund
The Class SummaryFund.
SupplementalLineConfig
The Class SupplementalLineConfig.
SupplementalLineKind
The Enum SupplementalLineKind.
SupplementalLineRow
The Class SupplementalLineRow.
SupplementalLinesEditor
The Class SupplementalLinesEditor.
SupplementalLinesFxAdapter
The Class SupplementalLinesFxAdapter.
SupplementalLinesTabs
The Class SupplementalLinesTabs.
SwingReportAction
Swing Action base class that generates Jasper reports using the ReportService.
SwingReportActionTest
Tests for SwingReportAction and its concrete subclasses.
TableExportUtils
Utility methods to print and export JavaFX TableView data.
TestDatabase
Utility to initialize and reset the shared H2 database for tests.
ThemeManager
Simple helper for applying a UI theme across scenes.
Transaction
Represents a banking transaction for OFX export.
TransactionQueryFacade
Facade that provides a configurable way to query transactions and map the results into arbitrary JavaBeans (including the SCA report beans).
TransactionQueryFacade.QueryConfig
Immutable configuration for running a transaction query.
TransactionQueryFacade.QueryConfig.Builder
Builder for TransactionQueryFacade.QueryConfig.
TransactionQueryFacade.TransactionRecord
Result of a transaction query that captures the parent transaction and the entries that were used for filtering.
TransactionReportBean
Basic bean for the TransactionReport template.
TransactionType
Defines the various types of financial transactions, particularly relevant for investment activities or specific accounting entries.

UNDEPOSITED_FUNDSJasperGenerator
 
UndepositedFundsItem
 
UndepositedFundsPanelFX
 
UndepositedFundsRepository
 
UndepositedFundsService
The Class UndepositedFundsService.
UndoEditAction
Represents a Swing Action intended to trigger an "undo" operation for the last edit performed in a viewer, presumably a table viewer like one managed by PageViewerPanel or XlsmTableViewerFX.
UndoEditActionTest
The Class UndoEditActionTest.
XlsmTableViewerFX
Utility class for reading data from an Excel XLSM file (macro-enabled workbook) and converting a specified sheet into a Swing DefaultTableModel.
